---
pagetitle: "Digital Infrastructure — chen.ist"
title-block-style: none
description: "Production-grade open-source, Linux, BSD, and Apple Business infrastructure for SMBs. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud, and zero-touch Apple device deployment."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .quarto-title-block, #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
        #quarto-content > * { margin-top: 0 !important; padding-top: 0 !important; }
        main.content { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:65vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Digital<br>Infrastructure</h1>
    <p>Open-source, UNIX, and Apple platforms. Deployed and managed for your business.</p>
    <a href="#pillars" class="ev-btn">Explore</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">40–70%</div><div class="m-nl">IT cost savings</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Open-source</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data sovereignty</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- THREE PILLARS -->
<div class="m-s" id="pillars" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Three pillars. One partner.</h2>
    <p class="sub">Everything your business needs to run, secured and maintained by us.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#opensource" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Open Source"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 1</div><h3>Open-Source Stack</h3><p>Productivity, communication, identity, and monitoring — no license fees.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#unix" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="UNIX"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 2</div><h3>UNIX Systems</h3><p>Linux and BSD servers, firewalls, storage, and declarative infrastructure.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="#apple" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Apple"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Pillar 3</div><h3>Apple Infrastructure</h3><p>Apple Business MDM, zero-touch deployment, email, and brand management.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- OPEN SOURCE -->
<div class="m-bg" id="opensource" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Open-source development"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Replace licenses.<br>Keep the functionality.</h2>
        <p>Nextcloud for files. Collabora for documents. Matrix for chat. Keycloak for SSO. Prometheus for monitoring. All open-source, all self-hosted, all yours.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Plan your stack</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UNIX -->
<div class="m-s" id="unix" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="UNIX server infrastructure"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Servers that run<br>themselves.</h2>
        <p>NixOS for declarative, reproducible deployments. OpenBSD for firewalls. FreeBSD for ZFS storage. Debian for everything else. Hardened by default.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Design your infrastructure</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- APPLE -->
<div class="m-bg" id="apple" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Apple Business deployment"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Apple Business.<br>Free. Built-in. Ready.</h2>
        <p>The new unified platform launches April 14, 2026. Free MDM, Blueprints for zero-touch setup, business email on your domain, and brand management across Maps, Wallet, and Mail.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Set up Apple Business</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PACKAGES -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Pick your starting point</h2>
    <p class="sub">All packages include deployment, hardening, monitoring, and support.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="m-pkg">
          <h3>Starter</h3>
          <div class="sz">1–10 employees</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Apple Business setup</li>
            <li>1 Linux server</li>
            <li>Nextcloud + email</li>
            <li>Basic firewall</li>
            <li>Automated backups</li>
            <li>Uptime monitoring</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Get a quote</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="m-pkg ft">
          <div class="m-badge">Most popular</div>
          <h3>Growth</h3>
          <div class="sz">11–50 employees</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Everything in Starter</li>
            <li>Full Apple MDM</li>
            <li>OpenBSD firewall + VPN</li>
            <li>Keycloak SSO</li>
            <li>Matrix messaging</li>
            <li>Collabora documents</li>
            <li>Prometheus + Grafana</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="font-size:0.9rem; padding:0.7rem 1.75rem; color:#fff !important;">Book consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="m-pkg">
          <h3>Enterprise</h3>
          <div class="sz">50+ employees</div>
          <ul>
            <li>Everything in Growth</li>
            <li>NixOS multi-server fleet</li>
            <li>FreeBSD ZFS storage</li>
            <li>Multi-site VPN mesh</li>
            <li>NIS2 + GDPR baselines</li>
            <li>24/7 incident response</li>
          </ul>
          <a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Contact us</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RELATED -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Related services</h2>
    <p class="sub">Infrastructure works best with the right security and cloud strategy.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/security/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Security</h3><p>24/7 SOC, threat hunting, and NIS2 compliance.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/services/cloud/" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cloud Services</h3><p>EU-first cloud migration and multi-cloud management.</p></div></div></a></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><a href="/compare.html" style="text-decoration:none;"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Compare"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Why Open Source</h3><p>See how open-source stacks up against proprietary alternatives.</p></div></div></a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Your infrastructure,<br>built right</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest assessment of what we can build for you.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Book your free audit</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No lock-in &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Proposal in 48h
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
